title: Seele emblem behind kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Seele emblem behind kaworu?             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 16, 2007 4:49 am The last time I looked at these boards Reichu was still working on the Kaworu-Katsuragi connection, I was browsing through it, and I noticed that in one of the shots of unit 01 holding Kaworu, The Seele emblem is clearly in the background. I found this confusing because a cursory search of the thread-page this picture was on made no note of this, and secondly, there is no reason for unit 01's fists to have eyes coming out of the fingers or something wierd like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Fri Mar 16, 2007 5:59 am That's Lilith's face.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 16, 2007 8:01 am Red = Lilith's face. Purple = Unit 01's fingers. Ta-daa.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Mar 16, 2007 8:40 am you know whats creepy?...those look like actual eyes opening on the mask up close...(maybe she really has Godon her face)...ive always thought the idea of the seven eyes making some sort of significant appearance...im actually trying to compose a drawing of the childeren looking up to see seven eyes leering upon them...

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 16, 2007 12:27 pm Oh... Duh. Lilith's mask/face. For some reason I had expected them to be farther away from Lilith, but yeah, makes perfect sense.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Mar 17, 2007 2:50 am im continuing my theory that the mask is a seperate organsim (GOD!!!)... Why else would the boils be on the mask AND the head

[]:             Quote Post by Good_Noodle » Sat Mar 17, 2007 9:27 am They look like craters to me, like the ones on the moon. Lilith comes from the white moon, so that's probably an influence on the design of the mask.

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Sat Mar 17, 2007 2:07 pm slothen wrote: For some reason I had expected them to be farther away from Lilith...

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sun Mar 18, 2007 4:54 pm good to meet you legendary Xanatose...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Mar 18, 2007 5:10 pm master0rolando wrote: Why else would the boils be on the mask AND the head

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 18, 2007 5:37 pm Good_Noodle wrote: Lilith comes from the white moon, so that's probably an influence on the design of the mask.

[]:             Quote Post by Good_Noodle » Sun Mar 18, 2007 5:50 pm Whoops, silly me! :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Mar 18, 2007 6:37 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: master0rolando wrote: Why else would the boils be on the mask AND the head

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sun Mar 18, 2007 8:13 pm I always like looking at that image because it seems lillith's eyes are looking at Kaworu, longing to be recombined with an angel. But thats just my thoughts.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Mar 19, 2007 5:57 pm they dont look like theyre looking at him...theyre pointing to the right of him...(our left)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 21, 2007 7:48 pm Fearthebait wrote: I always like looking at that image because it seems lillith's eyes are looking at Kaworu, longing to be recombined with an angel. But thats just my thoughts.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Mar 21, 2007 8:57 pm Kaworu has Adam's soul remember?

[]:             Quote Post by Good_Noodle » Thu Mar 22, 2007 7:14 am Sachiel_13 wrote: but i thought the Angels had to b combined with Adam. then what was the whole point of Rei eating up Gendo's Hand with Adam on it, and then Combining with Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Mar 22, 2007 7:43 pm Good_Noodle wrote: The reason that Gendo grafted Adam onto his hand is so that he can combine with Rei and Lilith during 3I to have control over instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2007 7:46 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: After all, he does move Adam's embryo, complete with it's empty core, down to the vicinity of Rei's uterus. Hmmmm...?

I found this confusing because a cursory search of the thread-page this picture was on made no note of this, and secondly, there is no reason for unit 01's fists to have eyes coming out of the fingers or something wierd like that.
